title: thelypteris coriacea
intro: Thelypteris coriacea, also known as the rough shield fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Thelypteris coriacea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe skin irritations, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris coriacea include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of ailments from wounds to digestive issues.
